title: Condition → condition_occurrence / domain routing
notes:
Branch: the Condition stage-1 view (mapspec/views/Condition__condition_occurrence.view.json) fans out one staging row per `code.coding[] | evidence.concept.coding[]`. The shared resolve pass (mapspec/etl/_resolve_condition.sql) walks each coding's system through cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab → vocab.concept (source) → 'Maps to' → vocab.concept (standard, standard_concept='S'), then DISTINCT ON (id, std.concept_id) collapses multiple codings of the same Condition that resolve to the same standard concept (ORDER BY prefers SNOMED so the surviving src_* columns come from the already-standard vocab). Each surviving row carries std_domain. The four per-domain stage-2 ETLs then filter by std_domain: 'Condition'→condition_occurrence, 'Observation'→observation, 'Procedure'→procedure_occurrence, 'Measurement'→measurement. Surrogate PK = stringToId(Condition.id || '|' || std_concept_id) (omitted from expected rows — derived). person_id / visit_occurrence_id / provider_id are referenceToId() FK hashes asserted symbolically as ref:.

KEY MAPPING RULES (from Condition__condition_occurrence.sql):
- condition_concept_id = std_concept_id; condition_source_concept_id = src_concept_id; condition_source_value = left(COALESCE(code_display, src_code, code_text),50).
- dates: start = COALESCE(onset.ofType(dateTime), onset.ofType(Period).start, recordedDate); end = COALESCE(abatement.ofType(dateTime), abatement.ofType(Period).end). Cast ::date and ::timestamp (wall-clock, NOT UTC-converted — the offset is dropped, not applied).
- condition_type_concept_id = COALESCE(cm.fhir_condition_category_to_omop[category.first().coding.first().code], 32817). encounter-diagnosis→32827, problem-list-item→32840, health-concern→32817.
- condition_status_concept_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(verificationStatus_target,0), NULLIF(clinicalStatus_target,0), 0): verificationStatus PREFERRED over clinicalStatus. confirmed→32893, provisional→32899 (else 0); clinicalStatus only 'resolved'→32906 (everything else→0).
- EXCLUSION: WHERE COALESCE(verificationStatus,'confirmed') NOT IN ('refuted','entered-in-error') — applies to ALL four domain ETLs.
- stop_reason = left(abatement.ofType(string),20); condition_status_source_value = left(clinicalStatus.coding.first().code,50).
- provider_id = COALESCE(referenceToId(asserter), referenceToId(recorder)).

All concept_ids verified live in vocab.concept (v20260227 bundle): 320128 Essential hypertension (SNOMED 59621000, Condition, S), 35207668 Essential (primary) hypertension (ICD10CM I10, Condition, non-standard, Maps-to 320128), 4199788 Medication review due (SNOMED 314529007, Observation, S), 32827 EHR encounter record (Type Concept), 32840 EHR problem list (Type Concept), 32893 Confirmed diagnosis (Condition Status), 32906 Resolved condition (Condition Status). Constant gender/birthDate held fixed across variants so the verificationStatus / domain / coding dimensions are the only diffs.

cases.desc: (a) SNOMED encounter-diagnosis, active/confirmed → one condition_occurrence row (happy path)
(b) verificationStatus = 'refuted' → excluded (omop {} — zero rows in any table)
(c) verificationStatus = 'entered-in-error' → excluded (omop {} — zero rows in any table)
(d) SNOMED code whose Maps-to lands in the Observation domain → routes to observation, NOT condition_occurrence
(e) multi-coding SNOMED + ICD10CM that both Maps-to the same standard concept → dedup to ONE condition_occurrence row (SNOMED wins src_*)
(f) no verificationStatus, clinicalStatus='resolved' with abatementDateTime → condition_status from clinicalStatus fallback (32906) + end dates populated
(g) SNOMED code whose Maps-to lands in the Measurement domain → routes to measurement, NOT condition_occurrence (type_concept_id hardcoded 32827 by Condition__measurement.sql)
(h) SNOMED code whose Maps-to lands in the Procedure domain → routes to procedure_occurrence, NOT condition_occurrence (type_concept_id hardcoded 32827 by Condition__procedure_occurrence.sql)
(i) category = 'health-concern' → condition_type_concept_id 32817 (EHR) via cm row (distinct category branch, not the COALESCE default path)
(j) no category element → condition_type_concept_id falls back to COALESCE default 32817 (cat.concept_id is NULL, distinct from the health-concern cm-row path)
(l) verificationStatus='unconfirmed' (maps to 0, NOT excluded) + clinicalStatus='resolved' → NULLIF drops the 0, condition_status falls through to clinicalStatus 32906
(m) onset as Period (no onsetDateTime) → start date from onsetPeriod.start (onset_period_start branch of the date COALESCE)
(n) no onset at all → start date falls through to recordedDate (recorded_date branch of the date COALESCE)
(o) abatement as Period (no abatementDateTime) → end dates from abatementPeriod.end (abatement_period_end branch)
(p) abatement as string → stop_reason = left(abatementString,20); no abatement date so condition_end_date stays NULL

(q) lone ICD10CM coding (no SNOMED) → resolve walks cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab[icd-10-cm]→ICD10CM concept→'Maps to'→standard Condition; src_concept_id from the non-SNOMED vocab (35207668), std/concept = 320128 (extracted from the retired Synthea-CSV oracle, which was SNOMED-only and never exercised the multi-vocab resolve path)
